/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qt_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qt_test.dir/qt_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_test.dir/main.cpp.o -o qt_test  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
